note: ⚠️ STALE — freshest data is 1 day(s) old (as_of 2026-06-25, exported 2026-06-26); SAY SO at the top of the digest. Authoritative local data: GemRadar gems.db (CoinGecko market+fundamentals + DeFiLlama protocol fees/TVL/revenue/holders-revenue) over the longshot.db price/volume backbone. SHORT / AVOID lens (CrashRadar) over the broad top-~1000 universe. Raw signals, NO composite score. null = NO DATA (do not guess). Layers: OVERVALUATION GATES (O1 rich P/F·P/S, O2 dilution overhang, O3 no value-capture, O4 dilutive yield), DETERIORATION DIVERGENCES (X1 expensive-and-fading, X2 capital leaving, X3 TVL-crater=hack proxy, X4 narrative-fade, X5 unlock overhang), DISTRIBUTION TRAPS (T1 blowoff-breaking, T2 distribution/exhaustion). short_watch = confluence (count + SET of aligned layers, >=2). risk_tags (unaudited/fake-tvl/supply-side-capture/vol-exhaustion/already-crashed) are CONTEXT, not gates. Percentiles are sector-relative. This is an over-valued/over-extended/deteriorating detector, NOT a contract-level rug scanner (holder concentration / LP locks / contract flags are NO DATA).
